Package BusinessLayer

package BusinessLayer
  • Class
    Description
    AND
    AND gate component used in the digital logic simulator.
    Canvas
    Canvas class represents the drawing area where components and connectors (wires) are placed and interacted with.
    Circuit
    Represents a digital circuit with components and connectors.
    Component
    Abstract base class for all circuit components.
    Connector
    Represents a wire connecting two component pins in a circuit.
    ExportService
    Service class responsible for exporting Swing components as images.
    LED
    Represents a Light Emitting Diode (LED) component in a circuit simulation.
    NAND
    NAND gate component used in the digital logic simulator.
    NOR
    NOR gate component used in the digital logic simulator.
    NOT
    NOT gate (Inverter) component used in the digital logic simulator.
    OR
    OR gate component used in the digital logic simulator.
    Pin
    Represents an input or output pin on a digital component.
    Pin.PinType
    Type of pin: INPUT or OUTPUT.
    Project
    Represents a digital project consisting of multiple circuits.
    Switch
    Represents a digital switch component in a circuit.
    TruthTableGenerator
    Generates the truth table and Boolean expressions for a given circuit.
    XOR
    Represents a 2-input XOR (Exclusive OR) logic gate component.
